center.name: 庫克海峽
center.summary: 庫克海峽是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Black-billed gull、Hutton's shearwater，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Some South Island birds cross the Cook Strait after breeding season to winter in the North Island

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: There have been individual sightings around the entire New Zealand coast, but most birds feed off the eastern South Island, especially between Cook Strait and Banks Peninsula. Large flocks can be seen off the Kaikōura coast during summer. Outside the breeding season, they are mostly found in Australian waters
